task: Find everything relevant to the remaining work required to make the Lalin-native Lua 5.5 VM complete. Treat completion as one concrete target, not a loose list: a complete VM means this implementation can run Lua 5.5 programs with correct VM semantics through its own Lalin-native runtime, with SponJIT still separate. Gather facts about the current post-contract state, remaining stubs, missing semantic/runtime pieces, tests/conformance gaps, source/compiler coverage, and dependencies among unfinished areas. Include what is already done so the remaining work is grounded in the actual repo state.
lastOutputPreview:

2. `experiments/lua_interpreter_vm/src/contract.lua` (lines 1-17) - Machine-readable ABI/contract gates; `sponjit_allowed = false`.
